title: alchemilla glaberrima var. fallax
intro: Alchemilla glaberrima var. fallax, also known as Lady's Mantle or Alpine Lady's Mantle, is a plant species in the Rosaceae family, characterized by its rosettes of rounded, toothed leaves and small, greenish-yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and calm skin irritations. The health benefits of Alchemilla glaberrima var. fallax include its ability to support liver and kidney function, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a healthy digestive system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and achieve these health benefits.
